Home » aws-sdk-ruby-v3 » Index (D) » Aws » RDS » Types » DBInstance ▲
      123456789_123456789_123456789_123456789_123456789_

      Class: Aws::RDS::Types::DBInstance

      Relationships & Source Files
      Super Chains via Extension / Inclusion / Inheritance
      Class Chain:
      self, Struct
      Instance Chain:
      self, ::Aws::Structure, Struct
      Inherits: Struct
      • Object
      • Struct
      • Aws::RDS::Types::DBInstance
      Defined in: gems/aws-sdk-rds/lib/aws-sdk-rds/types.rb

      Overview

      Contains the details of an Amazon RDS DB instance.

      This data type is used as a response element in the DescribeDBInstances action.

      See Also:

      • AWS API Documentation

      Constant Summary

      • SENSITIVE =
        # File 'gems/aws-sdk-rds/lib/aws-sdk-rds/types.rb', line 6735 
        []

      Instance Attribute Summary

      • #allocated_storage ⇒ Integer rw

        Specifies the allocated storage size specified in gibibytes.

      • #associated_roles ⇒ Array<Types::DBInstanceRole> rw

        The AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles associated with the DB instance.

      • #auto_minor_version_upgrade ⇒ Boolean rw

        A value that indicates that minor version patches are applied automatically.

      • #availability_zone ⇒ String rw

        Specifies the name of the Availability Zone the DB instance is located in.

      • #aws_backup_recovery_point_arn ⇒ String rw

        The Amazon ::Aws::RDS::Resource Name (ARN) of the recovery point in AWS Backup.

      • #backup_retention_period ⇒ Integer rw

        Specifies the number of days for which automatic DB snapshots are retained.

      • #ca_certificate_identifier ⇒ String rw

        The identifier of the CA certificate for this DB instance.

      • #character_set_name ⇒ String rw

        If present, specifies the name of the character set that this instance is associated with.

      • #copy_tags_to_snapshot ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies whether tags are copied from the DB instance to snapshots of the DB instance.

      • #customer_owned_ip_enabled ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies whether a customer-owned IP address (CoIP) is enabled for an ::Aws::RDS on ::Aws::Outposts DB instance.

      • #db_cluster_identifier ⇒ String rw

        If the DB instance is a member of a DB cluster, contains the name of the DB cluster that the DB instance is a member of.

      • #db_instance_arn ⇒ String rw

        The Amazon ::Aws::RDS::Resource Name (ARN) for the DB instance.

      • #db_instance_automated_backups_replications ⇒ Array<Types::DBInstanceAutomatedBackupsReplication> rw

        The list of replicated automated backups associated with the DB instance.

      • #db_instance_class ⇒ String rw

        Contains the name of the compute and memory capacity class of the DB instance.

      • #db_instance_identifier ⇒ String rw

        Contains a user-supplied database identifier.

      • #db_instance_port ⇒ Integer rw

        Specifies the port that the DB instance listens on.

      • #db_instance_status ⇒ String rw

        Specifies the current state of this database.

      • #db_name ⇒ String rw

        The meaning of this parameter differs according to the database engine you use.

      • #db_parameter_groups ⇒ Array<Types::DBParameterGroupStatus> rw

        Provides the list of DB parameter groups applied to this DB instance.

      • #db_security_groups ⇒ Array<Types::DBSecurityGroupMembership> rw

        A list of DB security group elements containing DBSecurityGroup.Name and DBSecurityGroup.Status subelements.

      • #db_subnet_group ⇒ Types::DBSubnetGroup rw

        Specifies information on the subnet group associated with the DB instance, including the name, description, and subnets in the subnet group.

      • #dbi_resource_id ⇒ String rw

        The AWS Region-unique, immutable identifier for the DB instance.

      • #deletion_protection ⇒ Boolean rw

        Indicates if the DB instance has deletion protection enabled.

      • #domain_memberships ⇒ Array<Types::DomainMembership> rw

        The Active Directory Domain membership records associated with the DB instance.

      • #enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports ⇒ Array<String> rw

        A list of log types that this DB instance is configured to export to ::Aws::CloudWatch Logs.

      • #endpoint ⇒ Types::Endpoint rw

        Specifies the connection endpoint.

      • #engine ⇒ String rw

        The name of the database engine to be used for this DB instance.

      • #engine_version ⇒ String rw

        Indicates the database engine version.

      • #enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn ⇒ String rw

        The Amazon ::Aws::RDS::Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon CloudWatch Logs log stream that receives the Enhanced Monitoring metrics data for the DB instance.

      • #iam_database_authentication_enabled ⇒ Boolean rw

        True if mapping of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) accounts to database accounts is enabled, and otherwise false.

      • #instance_create_time ⇒ Time rw

        Provides the date and time the DB instance was created.

      • #iops ⇒ Integer rw

        Specifies the Provisioned IOPS (I/O operations per second) value.

      • #kms_key_id ⇒ String rw

        If StorageEncrypted is true, the AWS KMS key identifier for the encrypted DB instance.

      • #latest_restorable_time ⇒ Time rw

        Specifies the latest time to which a database can be restored with point-in-time restore.

      • #license_model ⇒ String rw

        License model information for this DB instance.

      • #listener_endpoint ⇒ Types::Endpoint rw

        Specifies the listener connection endpoint for SQL Server Always On.

      • #master_username ⇒ String rw

        Contains the master username for the DB instance.

      • #max_allocated_storage ⇒ Integer rw

        The upper limit to which Amazon RDS can automatically scale the storage of the DB instance.

      • #monitoring_interval ⇒ Integer rw

        The interval, in seconds, between points when Enhanced Monitoring metrics are collected for the DB instance.

      • #monitoring_role_arn ⇒ String rw

        The ARN for the ::Aws::IAM role that permits ::Aws::RDS to send Enhanced Monitoring metrics to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

      • #multi_az ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies if the DB instance is a Multi-AZ deployment.

      • #nchar_character_set_name ⇒ String rw

        The name of the NCHAR character set for the Oracle DB instance.

      • #option_group_memberships ⇒ Array<Types::OptionGroupMembership> rw

        Provides the list of option group memberships for this DB instance.

      • #pending_modified_values ⇒ Types::PendingModifiedValues rw

        A value that specifies that changes to the DB instance are pending.

      • #performance_insights_enabled ⇒ Boolean rw

        True if Performance Insights is enabled for the DB instance, and otherwise false.

      • #performance_insights_kms_key_id ⇒ String rw

        The AWS ::Aws::KMS key identifier for encryption of Performance Insights data.

      • #performance_insights_retention_period ⇒ Integer rw

        The amount of time, in days, to retain Performance Insights data.

      • #preferred_backup_window ⇒ String rw

        Specifies the daily time range during which automated backups are created if automated backups are enabled, as determined by the BackupRetentionPeriod.

      • #preferred_maintenance_window ⇒ String rw

        Specifies the weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur, in Universal Coordinated Time (UTC).

      • #processor_features ⇒ Array<Types::ProcessorFeature> rw

        The number of CPU cores and the number of threads per core for the DB instance class of the DB instance.

      • #promotion_tier ⇒ Integer rw

        A value that specifies the order in which an Aurora Replica is promoted to the primary instance after a failure of the existing primary instance.

      • #publicly_accessible ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies the accessibility options for the DB instance.

      • #read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers ⇒ Array<String> rw

        Contains one or more identifiers of Aurora DB clusters to which the ::Aws::RDS DB instance is replicated as a read replica.

      • #read_replica_db_instance_identifiers ⇒ Array<String> rw

        Contains one or more identifiers of the read replicas associated with this DB instance.

      • #read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier ⇒ String rw

        Contains the identifier of the source DB instance if this DB instance is a read replica.

      • #replica_mode ⇒ String rw

        The open mode of an Oracle read replica.

      • #secondary_availability_zone ⇒ String rw

        If present, specifies the name of the secondary Availability Zone for a DB instance with multi-AZ support.

      • #status_infos ⇒ Array<Types::DBInstanceStatusInfo> rw

        The status of a read replica.

      • #storage_encrypted ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies whether the DB instance is encrypted.

      • #storage_type ⇒ String rw

        Specifies the storage type associated with DB instance.

      • #tag_list ⇒ Array<Types::Tag> rw

        A list of tags.

      • #tde_credential_arn ⇒ String rw

        The ARN from the key store with which the instance is associated for TDE encryption.

      • #timezone ⇒ String rw

        The time zone of the DB instance.

      • #vpc_security_groups ⇒ Array<Types::VpcSecurityGroupMembership> rw

        Provides a list of VPC security group elements that the DB instance belongs to.

      Instance Method Summary

      ::Aws::Structure - Included

      #to_hash

      Alias for Structure#to_h.

      Instance Attribute Details

      #allocated_storage ⇒ Integer (rw)

      Specifies the allocated storage size specified in gibibytes.

      [ GitHub ]

class DBInstance < Struct.new(
  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :engine,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :db_name,

instance is associated with.

    #copy_tags_to_snapshot  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies whether tags are copied from the DB instance to snapshots
of the DB instance.
      

      Amazon Aurora
      

      Not applicable. Copying tags to snapshots is managed by the DB
cluster. Setting this value for an Aurora DB instance has no effect
on the DB cluster setting. For more information, see DBCluster.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #customer_owned_ip_enabled  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies whether a customer-owned IP address (CoIP) is enabled for
an ::Aws::RDS on ::Aws::Outposts DB instance.
      

      A CoIP provides local or external connectivity to resources
in your Outpost subnets through your on-premises network. For some
use cases, a CoIP can provide lower latency for connections to the
DB instance from outside of its virtual private cloud (VPC) on your
local network.
      

      For more information about ::Aws::RDS on ::Aws::Outposts, see Working with Amazon
::Aws::RDS on AWS Outposts in the Amazon ::Aws::RDS User Guide.
      

      For more information about CoIPs, see Customer-owned IP
addresses in the AWS ::Aws::Outposts User Guide.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #db_instance_port  ⇒ Integer  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the port that the DB instance listens on. If the DB
instance is part of a DB cluster, this can be a different port than
the DB cluster port.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

  :listener_endpoint,
  :max_allocated_storage,
  :tag_list,
  :db_instance_automated_backups_replications,
  :customer_owned_ip_enabled,
  :aws_backup_recovery_point_arn)
  SENSITIVE = []
  include Aws::Structure
end

      
  
      

      

      


      
  
      
    #db_instance_status  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the current state of this database.
      

      For information about DB instance statuses, see DB Instance
Status in the Amazon ::Aws::RDS User Guide.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :engine,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :db_name,
  :endpoint,
  :allocated_storage,
  :instance_create_time,
  :preferred_backup_window,
  :backup_retention_period,
  :db_security_groups,

    #db_name  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The meaning of this parameter differs according to the database
engine you use.
      

      MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, PostgreSQL
      

      Contains the name of the initial database of this instance that was
provided at create time, if one was specified when the DB instance
was created. This same name is returned for the life of the DB
instance.
      

      Type: String
      

      Oracle
      

      Contains the Oracle System ID (SID) of the created DB instance. Not
shown when the returned parameters do not apply to an Oracle DB
instance.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      The AWS Region-unique, immutable identifier for the DB instance.
This identifier is found in AWS CloudTrail log entries whenever the
AWS KMS customer master key (CMK) for the DB instance is accessed.

    #deletion_protection  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Indicates if the DB instance has deletion protection enabled. The
database can't be deleted when deletion protection is enabled. For
more information, see  Deleting a DB Instance.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      A list of log types that this DB instance is configured to export to
::Aws::CloudWatch Logs.
      

      ::Aws::Log types vary by DB engine. For information about the log types for
each DB engine, see Amazon ::Aws::RDS Database ::Aws::Log Files in the
Amazon ::Aws::RDS User Guide.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :engine,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,

    #iam_database_authentication_enabled  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      True if mapping of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) accounts
to database accounts is enabled, and otherwise false.
      

      ::Aws::IAM database authentication can be enabled for the following
database engines
      

        

      • 

        For MySQL 5.6, minor version 5.6.34 or higher
        

        • 

      • 

        For MySQL 5.7, minor version 5.7.16 or higher
        

        • 

      • 

        Aurora 5.6 or higher. To enable ::Aws::IAM database authentication for
Aurora, see DBCluster Type.
        

        • 

      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #kms_key_id  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      If StorageEncrypted is true, the AWS KMS key identifier for the
encrypted DB instance.
      

      The AWS ::Aws::KMS key identifier is the key ::Aws::ARN, key ID, alias ::Aws::ARN, or
alias name for the AWS KMS customer master key (CMK).
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #nchar_character_set_name  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The name of the NCHAR character set for the Oracle DB instance. This
character set specifies the Unicode encoding for data stored in
table columns of type NCHAR, NCLOB, or NVARCHAR2.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #pending_modified_values  ⇒ Types::PendingModifiedValues  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      A value that specifies that changes to the DB instance are pending.
This element is only included when changes are pending. Specific
changes are identified by subelements.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #performance_insights_kms_key_id  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The AWS ::Aws::KMS key identifier for encryption of Performance Insights
data.
      

      The AWS ::Aws::KMS key identifier is the key ::Aws::ARN, key ID, alias ::Aws::ARN, or
alias name for the AWS KMS customer master key (CMK).
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #performance_insights_retention_period  ⇒ Integer  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The amount of time, in days, to retain Performance Insights data.
Valid values are 7 or 731 (2 years).

    #preferred_backup_window  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the daily time range during which automated backups are
created if automated backups are enabled, as determined by the
BackupRetentionPeriod.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #promotion_tier  ⇒ Integer  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      A value that specifies the order in which an Aurora Replica is
promoted to the primary instance after a failure of the existing
primary instance. For more information, see  Fault Tolerance for an
Aurora DB Cluster in the Amazon Aurora User Guide.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-rds/lib/aws-sdk-rds/types.rb', line 6670

end

      
  
      

      

      


      
  
      
    #publicly_accessible  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the accessibility options for the DB instance.
      

      When the DB instance is publicly accessible, its DNS endpoint
resolves to the private IP address from within the DB instance's
VPC, and to the public IP address from outside of the DB instance's
VPC. Access to the DB instance is ultimately controlled by the
security group it uses, and that public access is not permitted if
the security group assigned to the DB instance doesn't permit it.
      

      When the DB instance isn't publicly accessible, it is an internal
DB instance with a DNS name that resolves to a private IP address.
      

      For more information, see CreateDBInstance.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-rds/lib/aws-sdk-rds/types.rb', line 6670

    #read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers  ⇒ Array<String>  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Contains one or more identifiers of Aurora DB clusters to which the
::Aws::RDS DB instance is replicated as a read replica. For example, when
you create an Aurora read replica of an ::Aws::RDS MySQL DB instance, the
Aurora MySQL DB cluster for the Aurora read replica is shown. This
output does not contain information about cross region Aurora read
replicas.
      

       Currently, each ::Aws::RDS DB instance can have only one Aurora read
replica.
      
 

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-rds/lib/aws-sdk-rds/types.rb', line 6670

    #read_replica_db_instance_identifiers  ⇒ Array<String>  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Contains one or more identifiers of the read replicas associated
with this DB instance.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

end

      
  
      

      

      


      
  
      
    #read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Contains the identifier of the source DB instance if this DB
instance is a read replica.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #replica_mode  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The open mode of an Oracle read replica. The default is
open-read-only. For more information, see Working with Oracle
Read Replicas for Amazon RDS in the Amazon ::Aws::RDS User Guide.
      

       This attribute is only supported in ::Aws::RDS for Oracle.
      
 

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

for a DB instance with multi-AZ support.

    #timezone  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The time zone of the DB instance. In most cases, the Timezone
element is empty. Timezone content appears only for Microsoft SQL
Server DB instances that were created with a time zone specified.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #vpc_security_groups  ⇒ Array<Types::VpcSecurityGroupMembership>  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Provides a list of VPC security group elements that the DB instance
belongs to.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-rds/lib/aws-sdk-rds/types.rb', line 6670
      

      
class DBInstance < Struct.new(
  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :engine,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :db_name,
  :endpoint,
  :allocated_storage,
  :instance_create_time,
  :preferred_backup_window,
  :backup_retention_period,
  :db_security_groups,
  :vpc_security_groups,
  :db_parameter_groups,
  :availability_zone,
  :db_subnet_group,
  :preferred_maintenance_window,
  :pending_modified_values,
  :latest_restorable_time,
  :multi_az,
  :engine_version,
  :auto_minor_version_upgrade,
  :read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier,
  :read_replica_db_instance_identifiers,
  :read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers,
  :replica_mode,
  :license_model,
  :iops,
  :option_group_memberships,
  :character_set_name,
  :nchar_character_set_name,
  :secondary_availability_zone,
  :publicly_accessible,
  :status_infos,
  :storage_type,
  :tde_credential_arn,
  :db_instance_port,
  :db_cluster_identifier,
  :storage_encrypted,
  :kms_key_id,
  :dbi_resource_id,
  :ca_certificate_identifier,
  :domain_memberships,
  :copy_tags_to_snapshot,
  :monitoring_interval,
  :enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn,
  :monitoring_role_arn,
  :promotion_tier,
  :db_instance_arn,

  :iam_database_authentication_enabled,
  :performance_insights_enabled,
  :performance_insights_kms_key_id,

  :tag_list,

  :customer_owned_ip_enabled,
  :aws_backup_recovery_point_arn)
  SENSITIVE = []
  include Aws::Structure
end
